title: Apple’s New Siri AI Is Now Gemini
summary: Apple unveiled a rebuilt Siri AI at WWDC 2026 with personal context, screen awareness, and cross-device integration, but shares fell after the keynote and the new Siri is reportedly tied to Google Gemini. The EU will not receive it at launch, raising questions about whether Apple is catching up in AI or packaging rival technology.
writeup: The video covers Apple's WWDC 2026 reveal of a rebuilt Siri, which adds personal context, screen awareness, and cross-device integration under the Apple Intelligence banner. It centers on the report that the new Siri is tied to Google Gemini, framing the question of whether Apple is closing its AI gap or repackaging a rival's technology. Key takeaways: Apple shares fell after the keynote, and the EU will not get the updated Siri at launch.
